items.name: utils
items.title: Utilities
items.description: Utility functions for className merging with clsx and tailwind-merge

items.name: shimmering-text
items.title: Shimmering Text
items.description: Per-character shimmer animation for loading labels and badges

items.name: chart-utils
items.title: Chart Utilities
items.description: Shared Intl formatters, time-series decimation, and RAF tooltip scheduling for Bklit charts

items.name: chart-context
items.title: Chart Context
items.description: Shared context and hooks for Bklit chart components

items.name: chart-animation
items.title: Chart Animation
items.description: Shared motion helpers for chart enter transitions, clip reveals, and staggered animations

items.name: chart-series
items.title: Chart Series Layer
items.description: Shared line and area series rendering helpers (paths, markers, highlights, dash tails)

items.name: grid
items.title: Chart Grid
items.description: Grid lines for charts

items.name: reference-area
items.title: Reference Area
items.description: Shaded data-coordinate band for target ranges and thresholds on time-series charts

items.name: projection-line
items.title: Projection Line
items.description: Forecast segment extending a line series past the last data point

items.name: background
items.title: Chart Background
items.description: Pattern fill for the plot area when grid lines are hidden

items.name: x-axis
items.title: X Axis
items.description: X-axis component for time-series charts

items.name: y-axis
items.title: Y Axis
items.description: Y-axis component for value labels in line and area charts

items.name: chart-tooltip
items.title: Chart Tooltip
items.description: Composable tooltip components for charts

items.name: legend
items.title: Chart Legend
items.description: Composable legend components for charts

items.name: markers
items.title: Chart Markers
items.description: Marker components for highlighting data points on charts

items.name: area-chart
items.title: Area Chart
items.description: A composable area chart with gradient fills and animations

items.name: composed-chart
items.title: Composed Chart
items.description: Time-series chart composing Line, Area, and SeriesBar on one shared scale (Recharts ComposedChart-style)

items.name: bar-chart
items.title: Bar Chart
items.description: A composable bar chart with horizontal/vertical orientations and animations

items.name: line-chart
items.title: Line Chart
items.description: A composable line chart with multiple series support

items.name: profit-loss-line
items.title: Profit/Loss Line
items.description: Sign-colored line segments for profit and loss on LineChart

items.name: bar-depth
items.title: Bar Depth
items.description: 3D depth and glossy glass surfaces for BarChart bars

items.name: scatter-chart
items.title: Scatter Chart
items.description: A composable time-series scatter chart with offset rings, hover dimming, and animated enter

items.name: live-line-chart
items.title: Live Line Chart
items.description: Real-time streaming line chart with smooth scrolling, crosshair, and animated axes

items.name: candlestick-chart
items.title: Candlestick Chart
items.description: A composable OHLC candlestick chart with gradients, patterns, tooltips, and hover interactions

items.name: pie-chart
items.title: Pie Chart
items.description: A composable pie chart with animations and customizable slices

items.name: radar-chart
items.title: Radar Chart
items.description: A composable radar/spider chart with multiple data series

items.name: ring-chart
items.title: Ring Chart
items.description: A composable donut/ring chart with progress indicators

items.name: gauge-chart
items.title: Gauge
items.description: Notch-based radial or linear gauge with optional center label, patterns, and optional gradients

items.name: heatmap-chart
items.title: Heatmap Chart
items.description: A contribution heatmap with animated cells and configurable level colors

items.name: choropleth-chart
items.title: Choropleth Map
items.description: A geographic map chart with zoom, pan, and data visualization

items.name: funnel-chart
items.title: Funnel Chart
items.description: An animated funnel chart with multi-layer halo rings, hover interactions, and staggered entrance animations

items.name: sankey-chart
items.title: Sankey Diagram
items.description: A flow diagram for visualizing data transfers between nodes
